options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -allPGPinPort
options.description: Verify all PG ports connection.

options.name: -append
options.description: Displays incremental results in the Violation Browser

options.name: -centerLineConnect
options.description: Uses a center-line model instead of the geometrical model to check regular nets

options.name: -connLoop
options.description: Checks for connectivity loops in regular wires

options.name: -dividePowerNet
options.description: Divides power nets into four subareas for connectivity verification

options.name: -error
options.description: Specifies the maximum number of errors to report

options.name: -geomLoop
options.description: Checks for loop violations of regular nets using a geometrical model

options.name: -honorGroundLayerRange
options.description: hornor GROUNDCONNECTIVITYLAYERS in connectivity check

options.name: -ignorePGPin
options.description: Specifies the cell containing the pg pin that can be ignored in connectivity check

options.name: -markerOnHighestLayer
options.description: Marker on the highest layer

options.name: -net
options.description: Specifies whether to check named nets

options.name: -noAntenna
options.description: Ignores violations due to unconnected wires

options.name: -noFill
options.description: Specifies that metal fill should also be checked

options.name: -noFloatingMetal
options.description: Ignore floating metals that do not connected to any pin shapes

options.name: -noOpen
options.description: Ignores open violations

options.name: -noSoftPGConnect
options.description: Disables utilizing masterslice layers in connectivity check

options.name: -noUnConnPin
options.description: Ignores unconnected-pin violations

options.name: -noUnroutedNet
options.description: Ignores nets that are not routed

options.name: -noWeakConnect
options.description: Disables checking for routing to more than one port of the weakly connected pin ports

options.name: -preferredTopLayer
options.description: Specifies the preferred top layer to check

options.name: -rawViolsMark
options.description: Displays violation markers for opens as the bounding box of the island

options.name: -removeOldOpenVio
options.description: remove old open violation

options.name: -report
options.description: Specifies the report file for connectivity violation data

options.name: -selected
options.description: Specifies whether to check selected nets or nets connected to the pins of selected instances/macros

options.name: -tsv
options.description: Specifies the TSV abstract die files to verify connectivity between the current die and the adjacent dies

options.name: -type
options.description: Specifies the type of wires to verify

options.name: -useNewOpenVio
options.description: Use an open violation marker to show unconnected objects

options.name: -useVirtualConnection
options.description: Implies a virtual connection for all bumps and external I/O pins of the same net

options.name: -warning
options.description: Specifies the maximum number of warnings to report
